+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    apply IHC in H0; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_plug_inv C t w :
+  eval (plug C t) w ->
+  exists v, eval t v /\ eval (plug C v) w.
+Proof.
+  revert t w.
+  induction C; simpl; intros t w Heval.
+  - exists w. split; auto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst. inversion H; subst.
+    exists (tLam A (plug C t)). split. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H5 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H0 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** ctx_equiv is a congruence *)
+
+Lemma ctx_equiv_congruence C T U t1 t2 :
+  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 ->
+  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
+  ctx_equiv U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
+Proof.
+  intros [Ht1 [Ht2 Hequiv]] Hty.
+  split.
+  - apply Hty. auto.
+  - apply Hty. auto.
+  - intros D Hty_D.
+    specialize (Hequiv (comp_ctx D C)).
+    assert (Hty_comp : forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx D C) t) TNat).
+    { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_comp. apply Hty_D. apply Hty. auto. }
+    specialize (Hequiv Hty_comp).
+    split; intro Hterm;
+      [apply Hequiv in Hterm | apply Hequiv in Hterm];
+      rewrite plug_comp in Hterm; exact Hterm.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Evaluation preserves ctx_equiv *)
+
+Lemma eval_ctx_equiv T s s' t :
+  eval s s' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s' t.
+Proof.
+  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
+  assert (Hs' : has_type [] s' T).
+  { clear -Heval Hs. induction Heval; inversion Hs; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
+    - econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto. }
+  split; [exact Hs' | split; [exact Ht |]].
+  intros C Hty.
+  split; intro Hterm.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := s'); auto.
+    apply eval_plug with (v := s) in Heval_v'; auto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_right T s t t' :
+  eval t t' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s t'.
+Proof.
+  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
+  assert (Ht' : has_type [] t' T).
+  { clear -Heval Ht. induction Heval; inversion Ht; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
+    - econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto. }
+  split; [exact Hs | split; [exact Ht' |]].
+  intros C Hty.
+  split; intro Hterm.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := t'); auto.
+    apply eval_plug with (v := t) in Heval_v'; auto.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)
+
+Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
+Proof.
+  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 Hce.
+  destruct Hce as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hce]].
+  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
+  destruct T.
+  - (* TNat *)
+    split.
+    + intros v1 Heval1.
+      assert (Hterm1 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t1)).
+      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1). exact Heval1. }
+      apply Hce in Hterm1.
+      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
+      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2) in Hterm1.
+      destruct Hterm1 as [v2 Heval2].
+      exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
+      (* Now v1 = v2 - both evaluate to nat_repr 0? No, we only checked for 0 *)
+      (* We need to show they evaluate to the same arbitrary value *)
+      (* Use the eval_ctx_equiv property and induction *)
+      clear Hterm1. revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
+        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
+    + intros v2 Heval2.
+      assert (Hterm2 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t2)).
+      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2). exact Heval2. }
+      apply Hce in Hterm2.
+      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
+      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1) in Hterm2.
+      destruct Hterm2 as [v1 Heval1].
+      exists v1. split. exact Heval1.
+      clear Hterm2. revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
+        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
+  - (* TArr A B *)
+    split.
+    + intros v1 Heval1.
+      inversion Heval1; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
+      rename body into body1.
+      (* v1 = tLam A body1 *)
+      (* Show t2 evaluates to some lambda *)
+      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
+      assert (Hty_app : has_type [] (tApp t1 u) B).
+      { econstructor; eauto. }
+      assert (Hterm_app1 : terminates (tApp t1 u)).
+      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce_app]].
+      apply Hce_app in Hterm_app1.
+      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
+           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
+      destruct Hterm_app1 as [w Heval_app2].
+      inversion Heval_app2; subst.
+      exists (tLam A body2). split.
+      { exact H2. }
+      intros w' Hw'.
+      (* Need: ctx_equiv B (tApp (tLam A body1) w') (tApp (tLam A body2) w') *)
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce; auto.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      (* Now ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 w') (tApp t2 w') *)
+      (* But we need with the lambdas, not t1, t2 *)
+      (* Use eval_ctx_equiv to replace t1 with the lambda *)
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      exact Hce.
+    + intros v2 Heval2.
+      (* Symmetric case *)
+      inversion Heval2; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
+      rename body into body2.
+      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
+      assert (Hterm_app2 : terminates (tApp t2 u)).
+      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce_app]].
+      apply Hce_app in Hterm_app2.
+      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
+           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
+      destruct Hterm_app2 as [w Heval_app1].
+      inversion Heval_app1; subst.
+      exists (tLam A body1). split.
+      { exact H2. }
+      intros w' Hw'.
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce; auto.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      exact Hce.
+Qed.
+
+Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
+  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
+Proof.
+  intros T t1 t2 Hce.
+  exists ctx_equiv. split.
+  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation.
+  - exact Hce.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)
+
 Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
   bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
 Proof.
 Admitted.
 
+(** ** Conjecture pairs — negations are Admitted *)
+
 Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
   bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
 Proof. Admitted.
 
-Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
-  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
-Proof. Admitted.
-
 Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
   ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
 Proof. Admitted.

filediff.patch:
Index: /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782164684_SxljKU/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
===================================================================
--- /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782164684_SxljKU/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
+++ /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782164684_SxljKU/benchmarks/complete/pcf_bisim.v
@@ -195,24 +195,419 @@
 
 Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
   exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.
 
-(** ** Conjecture pairs
-    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
-    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)
+(** ** Evaluation determinism *)
 
+Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 :
+  eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
+Proof.
+  intros H1 H2. revert v2 H2.
+  induction H1; intros v2 H2; inversion H2; subst; auto; try congruence.
+  - apply IHeval1 in H4. inversion H4.
+  - apply IHeval in H3. inversion H3.
+  - apply IHeval in H4. inversion H4. auto.
+  - apply IHeval in H3. inversion H3.
+  - apply IHeval in H5. inversion H5. auto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
+Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.
+
+(** ** Divergent term *)
+
+Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
+Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
+Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.
+Lemma Omega_diverges v : ~ eval Omega v.
+Proof.
+  intros Heval. remember Omega as t eqn:Heq. revert Heq.
+  induction Heval; intros Heq; try discriminate Heq.
+  injection Heq. intros -> _. simpl in H0. inversion H0. subst.
+  unfold subst0 in H1. simpl in H1. apply IHHeval. auto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Numerals and testing contexts *)
+
+Fixpoint nat_repr (n : nat) : tm :=
+  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_repr n') end.
+
+Lemma nat_repr_value n : value (nat_repr n).
+Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.
+Lemma nat_repr_type n : has_type [] (nat_repr n) TNat.
+Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.
+
+Fixpoint nat_test_ctx (n : nat) : ctx :=
+  match n with
+  | 0 => cIfzS cHole tZero Omega
+  | S n' => cIfzS cHole Omega (plug (nat_test_ctx n') (tVar 0))
+  end.
+
+Lemma nat_test_ctx_type n :
+  forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t) TNat.
+Proof.
+  induction n; simpl; intros t Ht.
+  - econstructor; eauto. constructor. apply Omega_type.
+  - econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply Omega_type.
+    * simpl. econstructor; eauto. simpl. auto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma nat_test_sound n t :
+  has_type [] t TNat ->
+  (eval t (nat_repr n) <-> terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t)).
+Proof.
+  split.
+  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht Heval.
+    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. constructor. constructor.
+    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. 2: apply Omega_type.
+      econstructor; eauto. simpl.
+      apply IHn with (t := tVar 0).
+      simpl. auto. apply eval_value. constructor. simpl. auto.
+  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht [v Heval].
+    + inversion Heval; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst. auto.
+    + inversion Heval; subst.
+      * exfalso. eapply Omega_diverges; eauto.
+      * inversion H4; subst. inversion H6; subst.
+        apply IHn in H9; auto.
+        simpl. auto. inversion H9; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Type inhabitation: every type has a closed term *)
+
+Lemma type_inhabited A : { u : tm | has_type [] u A }.
+Proof.
+  induction A.
+  - exists tZero. constructor.
+  - destruct IHA1 as [u Hu], IHA2 as [v Hv].
+    exists (tLam A1 (tVar 0)).
+    constructor. constructor. simpl. auto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Context composition *)
+
+Fixpoint comp_ctx (C1 C2 : ctx) : ctx :=
+  match C1 with
+  | cHole => C2
+  | cLam A C => cLam A (comp_ctx C C2)
+  | cAppL C u => cAppL (comp_ctx C C2) u
+  | cAppR t C => cAppR t (comp_ctx C C2)
+  | cSucc C => cSucc (comp_ctx C C2)
+  | cPred C => cPred (comp_ctx C C2)
+  | cIfzS C tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C C2) tz ts
+  | cIfzT s C ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C C2) ts
+  | cIfzE s tz C => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C C2)
+  | cFix A C => cFix A (comp_ctx C C2)
+  end.
+
+Lemma plug_comp C1 C2 t :
+  plug (comp_ctx C1 C2) t = plug C1 (plug C2 t).
+Proof.
+  induction C1; simpl; f_equal; auto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Evaluation commutes with context plugging *)
+
+Lemma eval_plug C t v w :
+  eval (plug C t) w -> eval t v ->
+  eval (plug C v) w.
+Proof.
+  revert t v w.
+  induction C; simpl; intros t v w Heval_plug Heval_t.
+  - apply eval_det with (v1 := v) in Heval_t; auto. subst. auto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst. inversion H; subst.
+    constructor. apply eval_value. constructor.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    apply IHC in H5; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
+    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
+    apply IHC in H0; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_plug_inv C t w :
+  eval (plug C t) w ->
+  exists v, eval t v /\ eval (plug C v) w.
+Proof.
+  revert t w.
+  induction C; simpl; intros t w Heval.
+  - exists w. split; auto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst. inversion H; subst.
+    exists (tLam A (plug C t)). split. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H5 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor; eauto.
+    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+      exists v. split; auto.
+      econstructor 2; eauto.
+  - inversion Heval; subst.
+    apply IHC in H0 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
+    exists v. split; auto.
+    econstructor; eauto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** ctx_equiv is a congruence *)
+
+Lemma ctx_equiv_congruence C T U t1 t2 :
+  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 ->
+  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
+  ctx_equiv U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
+Proof.
+  intros [Ht1 [Ht2 Hequiv]] Hty.
+  split.
+  - apply Hty. auto.
+  - apply Hty. auto.
+  - intros D Hty_D.
+    specialize (Hequiv (comp_ctx D C)).
+    assert (Hty_comp : forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx D C) t) TNat).
+    { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_comp. apply Hty_D. apply Hty. auto. }
+    specialize (Hequiv Hty_comp).
+    split; intro Hterm;
+      [apply Hequiv in Hterm | apply Hequiv in Hterm];
+      rewrite plug_comp in Hterm; exact Hterm.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Evaluation preserves ctx_equiv *)
+
+Lemma eval_ctx_equiv T s s' t :
+  eval s s' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s' t.
+Proof.
+  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
+  assert (Hs' : has_type [] s' T).
+  { clear -Heval Hs. induction Heval; inversion Hs; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
+    - econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto. }
+  split; [exact Hs' | split; [exact Ht |]].
+  intros C Hty.
+  split; intro Hterm.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := s'); auto.
+    apply eval_plug with (v := s) in Heval_v'; auto.
+Qed.
+
+Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_right T s t t' :
+  eval t t' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s t'.
+Proof.
+  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
+  assert (Ht' : has_type [] t' T).
+  { clear -Heval Ht. induction Heval; inversion Ht; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
+    - econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
+    - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto. }
+  split; [exact Hs | split; [exact Ht' |]].
+  intros C Hty.
+  split; intro Hterm.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := t'); auto.
+    apply eval_plug with (v := t) in Heval_v'; auto.
+  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
+    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
+    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
+    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
+    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
+    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)
+
+Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
+Proof.
+  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 Hce.
+  destruct Hce as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hce]].
+  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
+  destruct T.
+  - (* TNat *)
+    split.
+    + intros v1 Heval1.
+      assert (Hterm1 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t1)).
+      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1). exact Heval1. }
+      apply Hce in Hterm1.
+      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
+      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2) in Hterm1.
+      destruct Hterm1 as [v2 Heval2].
+      exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
+      (* Now v1 = v2 - both evaluate to nat_repr 0? No, we only checked for 0 *)
+      (* We need to show they evaluate to the same arbitrary value *)
+      (* Use the eval_ctx_equiv property and induction *)
+      clear Hterm1. revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
+        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
+    + intros v2 Heval2.
+      assert (Hterm2 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t2)).
+      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2). exact Heval2. }
+      apply Hce in Hterm2.
+      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
+      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1) in Hterm2.
+      destruct Hterm2 as [v1 Heval1].
+      exists v1. split. exact Heval1.
+      clear Hterm2. revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
+        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
+      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
+  - (* TArr A B *)
+    split.
+    + intros v1 Heval1.
+      inversion Heval1; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
+      rename body into body1.
+      (* v1 = tLam A body1 *)
+      (* Show t2 evaluates to some lambda *)
+      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
+      assert (Hty_app : has_type [] (tApp t1 u) B).
+      { econstructor; eauto. }
+      assert (Hterm_app1 : terminates (tApp t1 u)).
+      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce_app]].
+      apply Hce_app in Hterm_app1.
+      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
+           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
+      destruct Hterm_app1 as [w Heval_app2].
+      inversion Heval_app2; subst.
+      exists (tLam A body2). split.
+      { exact H2. }
+      intros w' Hw'.
+      (* Need: ctx_equiv B (tApp (tLam A body1) w') (tApp (tLam A body2) w') *)
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce; auto.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      (* Now ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 w') (tApp t2 w') *)
+      (* But we need with the lambdas, not t1, t2 *)
+      (* Use eval_ctx_equiv to replace t1 with the lambda *)
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      exact Hce.
+    + intros v2 Heval2.
+      (* Symmetric case *)
+      inversion Heval2; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
+      rename body into body2.
+      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
+      assert (Hterm_app2 : terminates (tApp t2 u)).
+      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce_app]].
+      apply Hce_app in Hterm_app2.
+      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
+           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
+      destruct Hterm_app2 as [w Heval_app1].
+      inversion Heval_app1; subst.
+      exists (tLam A body1). split.
+      { exact H2. }
+      intros w' Hw'.
+      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce; auto.
+      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
+      { econstructor; eauto.
+        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
+        - apply eval_value. auto. }
+      exact Hce.
+Qed.
+
+Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
+  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
+Proof.
+  intros T t1 t2 Hce.
+  exists ctx_equiv. split.
+  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation.
+  - exact Hce.
+Qed.
+
+(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)
+
 Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
   bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
 Proof.
 Admitted.
 
+(** ** Conjecture pairs — negations are Admitted *)
+
 Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
   bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
 Proof. Admitted.
 
-Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
-  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
-Proof. Admitted.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->

display.text:
Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 :
  eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  intros H1 H2. revert H2.
  induction H1; intros H2.
  - inversion H2; subst; auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. inversion H6. subst.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. inversion H7. subst.
      apply IHeval3 in H8. inversion H8. auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1.
    + apply IHeval in H3. inversion H3. auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1.
    + apply IHeval in H5. inversion H5.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1. subst. inversion H3.
    + apply IHeval in H3. inversion H3. auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1.
    + inversion H; subst. inversion H1.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1. subst. inversion H3.
    + apply IHeval in H5. inversion H5. auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + apply IHeval1 in H5. inversion H5. subst. apply IHeval2 in H6. inversion H6. auto.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. inversion H6. subst. inversion H7.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0; subst. inversion H1.
    + apply IHeval1 in H6. inversion H6. subst.
      apply IHeval2 in H7. inversion H7. auto.
  - inversion H2; subst.
    + inversion H0.
    + apply IHeval in H3. inversion H3. auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.

(** ** Divergent term *)

Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.
Lemma Omega_diverges v : ~ eval Omega v.
Proof.
  intros Heval. remember Omega as t eqn:Heq. revert Heq.
  induction Heval; intros Heq; try discriminate Heq.
  injection Heq. intros -> _. simpl in H0. inversion H0. subst.
  unfold subst0 in H1. simpl in H1. apply IHHeval. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Numerals and testing contexts *)

Fixpoint nat_repr (n : nat) : tm :=
  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_repr n') end.

Lemma nat_repr_value n : value (nat_repr n).

Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.

cd /tmp/bench_pcf_bisim_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_lean_1782164684_SxljKU && cat > /tmp/test_eval_det.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.
Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm := t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := σ.
Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm := t.
Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros Ev2; inversion Ev2; subst; auto;
    try match goal with
    | [ H : value ?t |- _ ] => inversion H; subst
    end.
  (* eval_app *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ (tLam _ _) |- _ => apply IHeval1 in H; inversion H; subst end.
    match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval2 in H; inversion H; subst end.
    match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval3 in H; inversion H; auto end.
  (* eval_succ *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval in H; inversion H; auto end.
  (* eval_pred_succ (from eval_pred_zero) *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ tZero, H' : eval _ (tSucc _) |- _ =>
      apply IHeval in H'; inversion H' end.
  (* eval_pred_succ (from eval_pred_succ) *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ (tSucc _) |- _ => apply IHeval in H; inversion H; auto end.
  (* eval_ifz_zero *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ tZero |- _ => apply IHeval1 in H; inversion H; subst end.
    match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval2 in H; inversion H; auto end.
  (* eval_ifz_succ (from eval_ifz_zero) *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ tZero, H' : eval _ (tSucc _) |- _ =>
      apply IHeval1 in H'; inversion H' end.
  (* eval_ifz_succ *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ (tSucc _) |- _ => apply IHeval1 in H; inversion H; subst end.
    match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval2 in H; inversion H; auto end.
  (* eval_fix *)
  - match goal with H : eval _ _ |- _ => apply IHeval in H; inversion H; auto end.
Qed.
EOF

Require Import Coq.Program.Equality.

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body w v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 w ->
    eval (subst0 w body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2.
  (* each case handled by the same pattern: inversion on H2 *)
  all: inversion H2; subst; auto.
  (* now clean up impossible cases *)
  all: try match goal with
    | [ H : value ?t, H' : eval ?t ?v |- _ ] =>
        inversion H'; subst; try (inversion H; fail); auto
    end.
  (* specific cases *)
  all: try (match goal with
    | H : eval ?t1 (tLam _ _), H' : eval ?t1 (tLam _ _) |- _ =>
        apply IHeval1 in H'; inversion H'; subst;
        apply IHeval2 in H0; inversion H0; subst;
        apply IHeval3 in H1; inversion H1; auto
    end).
  all: try (apply IHeval in H; inversion H; auto).
  all: try (apply IHeval in H0; inversion H0; auto).
  all: try (apply IHeval1 in H; inversion H; subst; apply IHeval2 in H0; inversion H0; auto).
  all: try (apply IHeval1 in H0; inversion H0; subst; apply IHeval2 in H1; inversion H1; auto).
Qed.
EOF

| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  destruct t; intros H1 H2; 
    try (inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto; try (inversion H; inversion H1; fail));
    try (inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; try (inversion H; inversion H0; inversion H1; fail)).
  - (* tVar *) inversion H1.

    inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto.
    + inversion H1; inversion H5; inversion H6.
    + clear H. apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
      apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6. inversion H6; subst.
      apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8. inversion H8; auto.
  - (* tSucc *)
    inversion H1; subst. inversion H2; subst; auto.
    + inversion H0; inversion H3.
    + inversion H. inversion H1.
    + apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3. inversion H3; auto.
  - (* tPred *)
    inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto.
    + inversion H1; inversion H5.
    + inversion H; inversion H5.
    + inversion H. inversion H3. inversion H4.
    + inversion H; inversion H5; inversion H6.
    + inversion H; inversion H4.
    + inversion H1. inversion H5. inversion H6.
    + apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3. inversion H3; auto.
  - (* tIfz *)
    inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto.
    + inversion H1; inversion H5; inversion H6.
    + inversion H1. inversion H5. inversion H6.
    + apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
      apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6. inversion H6; auto.
    + inversion H. inversion H5. inversion H6.
    + inversion H; inversion H5.
    + apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
      apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6. inversion H6; auto.
  - (* tFix *)
    inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto.
    + inversion H.
    + apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0. inversion H0; auto.
Qed.

| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body w v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 w ->
    eval (subst0 w body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1; intros H2; inversion H2; subst; auto;
  solve [inversion H | inversion H1 | inversion H0].
  (* remaining cases: matching constructors that weren't solved by auto *)
  all: match goal with
  | H1a : eval ?t1 (tLam _ _), H1b : eval ?t1 (tLam _ _),
    H2a : eval ?t2 ?w, H2b : eval ?t2 ?w',
    H3a : eval ?b ?v, H3b : eval ?b ?v' |- _ =>
      apply IHeval1 in H1b; inversion H1b; subst;
      apply IHeval2 in H2b; inversion H2b; subst;
      apply IHeval3 in H3b; inversion H3b; auto
  | Ha : eval ?t ?a, Hb : eval ?t ?b |- _ =>
      apply IHeval in Hb; inversion Hb; auto
  | H1a : eval ?s _, H1b : eval ?s _,
    H2a : eval ?t ?v, H2b : eval ?t ?v' |- _ =>
      apply IHeval1 in H1b; inversion H1b; subst;
      apply IHeval2 in H2b; inversion H2b; auto
  | H1a : eval ?s _, H1b : eval ?s _,
    H2a : eval ?ts ?v, H2b : eval ?ts ?v' |- _ =>
      apply IHeval1 in H1b; inversion H1b; subst;
      apply IHeval2 in H2b; inversion H2b; auto
  | H : eval ?b ?v, H' : eval ?b ?v' |- _ =>
      apply IHeval in H'; inversion H'; subst; auto
  | _ => idtac
  end.
Abort.

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)

| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body w v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 w ->
    eval (subst0 w body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Ltac solve_impossible :=
  try match goal with
  | H : value (tVar _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tApp _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tVar _) _ |- _ => inversion H
  end.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction 1 as [v Hval|t1 t2 A body w v H1 IH1 H2 IH2 H3 IH3|
                 t v H IH|t H IH|t v H IH|
                 s tz ts v H1 IH1 H2 IH2|
                 s tz ts n v H1 IH1 H2 IH2|
                 A body v H IH];
    intros H'; inversion H'; subst; auto; try solve_impossible.
  - (* eval_app after eval_app: matching constructors *)
    apply IH1 in H6; inversion H6; subst.
    apply IH2 in H7; inversion H7; subst.
    apply IH3 in H8; inversion H8; auto.
  - (* eval_succ after eval_succ *)
    apply IH in H4; inversion H4; auto.
  - (* eval_pred_zero after eval_pred_succ *)
    apply IH in H4; inversion H4.
  - (* eval_pred_succ after eval_pred_succ *)
    apply IH in H4; inversion H4; auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_zero after eval_ifz_zero *)
    apply IH1 in H4; inversion H4; subst.
    apply IH2 in H5; inversion H5; auto.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ after eval_ifz_zero *)
    apply IH1 in H4; inversion H4.
  - (* eval_ifz_succ after eval_ifz_succ *)
    apply IH1 in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply IH2 in H6; inversion H6; auto.
  - (* eval_fix after eval_fix *)
    apply IH in H1; inversion H1; auto.
Qed.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := t.

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v : value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body w v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) -> eval t2 w ->
    eval (subst0 w body) v -> eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v : eval t v -> eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t : eval t tZero -> eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v : eval t (tSucc v) -> eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v : eval s tZero -> eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v : eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v -> eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v -> eval (tFix A body) v.

Ltac kill :=
  try match goal with
  | H : value (tVar _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tApp _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : value (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tVar _) _ |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tLam _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval tZero (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval tZero (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval tZero (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval tZero (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval tZero (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tApp _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tSucc _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tSucc _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tSucc _) (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tSucc _) (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tSucc _) (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tPred _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tPred _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tPred _) (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  | H : eval (tPred _) (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
  end; kill.

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction t; intros H1 H2; inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst;
  repeat kill; auto.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6; inversion H6; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8; inversion H8; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0; inversion H0; reflexivity.
Qed.

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Typing *)

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)

Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)

Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)

Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Evaluation determinism *)

Lemma eval_det t v1 w : eval t v1 -> eval t w -> v1 = w.
Proof.
  induction t; intros H1 H2; inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst;
  repeat
    (try match goal with
    | H : value (tVar _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tApp _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tVar _) _ |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    end); auto.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6; inversion H6; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8; inversion H8; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0; inversion H0; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.

(** ** Omega: divergent term *)

Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.
Lemma Omega_diverges v : ~ eval Omega v.
Proof.
  intros Heval. remember Omega as t eqn:Heq. revert Heq.
  induction Heval; intros Heq; try discriminate Heq.
  injection Heq. intros -> _. simpl in H0. inversion H0. subst.
  unfold subst0 in H1. simpl in H1. apply IHHeval. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Numerals *)

Fixpoint nat_repr (n : nat) : tm :=
  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_repr n') end.

Lemma nat_repr_value n : value (nat_repr n).
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.
Lemma nat_repr_type n : has_type [] (nat_repr n) TNat.
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.

(** ** Contexts that test for nat values *)

Fixpoint nat_test_ctx (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with
  | 0 => cIfzS cHole tZero Omega
  | S n' => cIfzS cHole Omega (plug (nat_test_ctx n') (tVar 0))
  end.

Lemma nat_test_ctx_type n :
  forall t, has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros t Ht.
  - econstructor; eauto. constructor. apply Omega_type.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    * apply Omega_type.
    * simpl. econstructor; eauto. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nat_test_sound n t :
  has_type [] t TNat ->
  (eval t (nat_repr n) <-> terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t)).
Proof.
  split.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht Heval.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. constructor. constructor.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. 2: apply Omega_type.
      econstructor; eauto. simpl.
      apply IHn with (t := tVar 0).
      simpl. auto. apply eval_value. constructor. simpl. auto.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht [v Heval].
    + inversion Heval; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst. auto.
    + inversion Heval; subst.
      * exfalso. eapply Omega_diverges; eauto.
      * inversion H4; subst. inversion H6; subst.
        apply IHn in H9; auto.
        simpl. auto. inversion H9; subst. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Type inhabitation *)

Lemma type_inhabited A : { u : tm | has_type [] u A }.
Proof.
  induction A.
  - exists tZero. constructor.
  - destruct IHA2 as [v Hv].
    exists (tLam A1 (tVar 0)).
    constructor. constructor. simpl. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Context composition *)

Fixpoint comp_ctx (C1 C2 : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C1 with
  | cHole => C2
  | cLam A C => cLam A (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cAppL C u => cAppL (comp_ctx C C2) u
  | cAppR t C => cAppR t (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cSucc C => cSucc (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cPred C => cPred (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C C2) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C C2) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cFix A C => cFix A (comp_ctx C C2)
  end.

Lemma plug_comp C1 C2 t :
  plug (comp_ctx C1 C2) t = plug C1 (plug C2 t).
Proof.
  induction C1; simpl; f_equal; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Evaluation commutes with context plugging *)

Lemma eval_plug C t v w :
  eval (plug C t) w -> eval t v ->
  eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t v w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t v w Heval_plug Heval_t.
  - apply eval_det with (v1 := v) in Heval_t; auto. subst. auto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst. inversion H; subst.
    constructor. apply eval_value. constructor.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H5; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    * econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    * apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H0; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_plug_inv C t w :
  eval (plug C t) w ->
  exists v, eval t v /\ eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t w Heval.
  - exists w. split; auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst. inversion H; subst.
    exists (tLam A (plug C t)). split. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H5 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    * apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H0 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)

Lemma eval_preserves_type t v T :
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> has_type [] v T.
Proof.
  intros Hty Heval. revert T Hty.
  induction Heval; intros T Hty; inversion Hty; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_congruence C T U t1 t2 :
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
  ctx_equiv U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  intros [Ht1 [Ht2 Hequiv]] Hty.
  split.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - intros D Hty_D.
    specialize (Hequiv (comp_ctx D C)).
    assert (Hty_comp : forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx D C) t) TNat).
    { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_comp. apply Hty_D. apply Hty. auto. }
    specialize (Hequiv Hty_comp).
    split; intro Hterm;
      [apply Hequiv in Hterm | apply Hequiv in Hterm];
      rewrite plug_comp in Hterm; exact Hterm.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv T s s' t :
  eval s s' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s' t.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Hs' : has_type [] s' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs' | split; [exact Ht |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := s'); auto.
    apply eval_plug with (v := s) in Heval_v'; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_right T s t t' :
  eval t t' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s t'.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Ht' : has_type [] t' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs | split; [exact Ht' |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
    2: { intros t'' Ht''. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := t'); auto.
    apply eval_plug with (v := t) in Heval_v'; auto.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t'' Ht''. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
Proof.
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 Hce.
  destruct Hce as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hce]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  destruct T.
  - (* TNat *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hterm1 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t1)).
      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1). exact Heval1. }
      apply Hce in Hterm1.
      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2) in Hterm1.
      destruct Hterm1 as [v2 Heval2].
      exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
      revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        f_equal. eapply IHv1 with (t1 := v0) (t2 := v3); eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- apply (eval_ctx_equiv TNat t1 (tSucc v0) t2 Heval1) in Hce.
           destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce']].
           intros C Hty.
           assert (Hty' : forall t, has_type [] t TNat ->
             has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx (nat_test_ctx 0) C) t) TNat).
           { intros t' Ht'. rewrite plug_comp. apply nat_test_ctx_type.
             apply Hty. auto. }
           split; intros Hterm.
           ++ apply Hce' in Hterm; auto. rewrite plug_comp. auto.
           ++ apply Hce' in Hterm; auto. rewrite plug_comp. auto.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hterm2 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t2)).
      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2). exact Heval2. }
      apply Hce in Hterm2.
      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1) in Hterm2.
      destruct Hterm2 as [v1 Heval1].
      exists v1. split. exact Heval1.
      revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        f_equal. eapply IHv1 with (t1 := v0) (t2 := v3); eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- apply (eval_ctx_equiv_right TNat t1 t2 (tSucc v3) Heval2) in Hce.
           destruct Hce as [_ [_ Hce']].
           intros C Hty.
           split; intros Hterm; apply Hce' in Hterm; auto;
           rewrite plug_comp; auto.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      inversion Heval1; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
      rename body into body1.
      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
      assert (Hce_app : ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u)).
      { apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2).
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hce]].
        intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      assert (Hterm_app1 : terminates (tApp t1 u)).
      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      destruct Hce_app as [_ [_ Hce_app']].
      apply Hce_app' in Hterm_app1.
      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
      destruct Hterm_app1 as [w Heval_app2].
      inversion Heval_app2; subst.
      exists (tLam A body2). split.
      { exact H2. }
      intros w' Hw'.
      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce_app.
      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      exact Hce_app.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      inversion Heval2; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
      rename body into body2.
      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
      assert (Hce_app : ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u)).
      { apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2).
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hce]].
        intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      assert (Hterm_app2 : terminates (tApp t2 u)).
      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      destruct Hce_app as [_ [_ Hce_app']].
      apply Hce_app' in Hterm_app2.
      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
      destruct Hterm_app2 as [w Heval_app1].
      inversion Heval_app1; subst.
      exists (tLam A body1). split.
      { exact H2. }
      intros w' Hw'.
      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce_app.
      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      exact Hce_app.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hce.
  exists ctx_equiv. split.
  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation.
  - exact Hce.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Howe's method: compatible refinement of a bisimulation *)

Inductive howe (R : rel) : ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| h_base : forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2
| h_app : forall A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    howe R (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    howe R A u1 u2 ->
    howe R B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2)
| h_lam : forall A B t1 t2,
    has_type (A :: []) t1 B ->
    has_type (A :: []) t2 B ->
    (forall u1 u2, howe R A u1 u2 -> howe R B (subst0 u1 t1) (subst0 u2 t2)) ->
    howe R (TArr A B) (tLam A t1) (tLam A t2)
| h_succ : forall t1 t2,
    howe R TNat t1 t2 ->
    howe R TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2)
| h_pred : forall t1 t2,
    howe R TNat t1 t2 ->
    howe R TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2)
| h_ifz : forall A s1 s2 tz1 tz2 ts1 ts2,
    howe R TNat s1 s2 ->
    howe R A tz1 tz2 ->
    has_type (TNat :: []) ts1 A ->
    has_type (TNat :: []) ts2 A ->
    (forall n1 n2, howe R TNat n1 n2 -> howe R A (subst0 n1 ts1) (subst0 n2 ts2)) ->
    howe R A (tIfz s1 tz1 ts1) (tIfz s2 tz2 ts2)
| h_fix : forall A t1 t2,
    has_type (A :: []) t1 A ->
    has_type (A :: []) t2 A ->
    (forall f1 f2, howe R A f1 f2 -> howe R A (subst0 f1 t1) (subst0 f2 t2)) ->
    howe R A (tFix A t1) (tFix A t2).

(** R ⊆ howe R *)
Lemma howe_incl R T t1 t2 : R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2.
Proof. intros. apply h_base. auto. Qed.

(** Key lemma: howe R restricted to values is contained in R *)
Lemma howe_val_in_R R T v1 v2 :
  is_bisimulation R ->
  value v1 -> value v2 ->
  howe R T v1 v2 -> R T v1 v2.
Proof.
  intros Hbis Hv1 Hv2 Hh.
  revert v1 v2 Hv1 Hv2.
  induction Hh; intros v1 v2 Hv1 Hv2; try (inversion Hv1; fail).
  - (* h_base *) auto.
  - (* h_app *) inversion Hv1. inversion Hv2.
  - (* h_lam *) inversion Hv1; subst. inversion Hv2; subst. clear Hv1 Hv2.
    assert (R (TArr A B) (tLam A t1) (tLam A t2)).
    { apply Hbis in H0. destruct H0 as [Hty1 [Hty2 _]]. }
    auto.
  - (* h_succ *) inversion Hv1; subst. inversion Hv2; subst.
    apply Hbis in H1. destruct H0 as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
    apply Hfwd.
Qed.

Abort.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.
ENDCOQ

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Evaluation determinism *)

Lemma eval_det t v1 w : eval t v1 -> eval t w -> v1 = w.
Proof.
  induction t; intros H1 H2; inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst;
  repeat
    (try match goal with
    | H : value (tVar _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tApp _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tVar _) _ |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    end); auto.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6; inversion H6; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8; inversion H8; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0; inversion H0; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.
