(** ** Evaluation determinism *)

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction t; intros H1 H2; inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst; auto;
    try (inversion H); try (inversion H1); try (inversion H0);
    try (inversion H2); try (inversion H3); try (inversion H4);
    try (inversion H5); try (inversion H6); try (inversion H7); try (inversion H8).
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6. inversion H6; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8. inversion H8. reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3. inversion H3. reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3. inversion H3.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3. inversion H3. reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6. inversion H6. reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5. inversion H5.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5. inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6. inversion H6. reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0. inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.

(** ** Omega: divergent term *)

Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.
Lemma Omega_diverges v : ~ eval Omega v.
Proof.
  intros Heval. remember Omega as t eqn:Heq. revert Heq.
  induction Heval; intros Heq; try discriminate Heq.
  injection Heq. intros -> _. simpl in H0. inversion H0. subst.
  unfold subst0 in H1. simpl in H1. apply IHHeval. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Numerals *)

Fixpoint nat_repr (n : nat) : tm :=
  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_repr n') end.

Lemma nat_repr_value n : value (nat_repr n).
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.
Lemma nat_repr_type n : has_type [] (nat_repr n) TNat.
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.

(** ** Contexts that test for specific Nat values *)

Fixpoint nat_test_ctx (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with
  | 0 => cIfzS cHole tZero Omega
  | S n' => cIfzS cHole Omega (plug (nat_test_ctx n') (tVar 0))
  end.

Lemma nat_test_ctx_type n t :
  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros t Ht.
  - econstructor; eauto. constructor. apply Omega_type.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    * apply Omega_type.
    * simpl. econstructor; eauto. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nat_test_sound n t :
  has_type [] t TNat ->
  (eval t (nat_repr n) <-> terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t)).
Proof.
  split.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht Heval.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. constructor. constructor.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. 2: apply Omega_type.
      econstructor; eauto. simpl.
      apply IHn with (t := tVar 0).
      simpl. auto. apply eval_value. constructor. simpl. auto.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht [v Heval].
    + inversion Heval; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst. auto.
    + inversion Heval; subst.
      * exfalso. eapply Omega_diverges; eauto.
      * inversion H4; subst. inversion H6; subst.
        apply IHn in H9; auto.
        simpl. auto. inversion H9; subst. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Type inhabitation *)

Lemma type_inhabited A : { u : tm | has_type [] u A }.
Proof.
  induction A.
  - exists tZero. constructor.
  - destruct IHA2 as [v Hv].
    exists (tLam A1 (tVar 0)).
    constructor. constructor. simpl. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Context composition *)

Fixpoint comp_ctx (C1 C2 : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C1 with
  | cHole => C2
  | cLam A C => cLam A (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cAppL C u => cAppL (comp_ctx C C2) u
  | cAppR t C => cAppR t (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cSucc C => cSucc (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cPred C => cPred (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C C2) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C C2) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cFix A C => cFix A (comp_ctx C C2)
  end.

Lemma plug_comp C1 C2 t :
  plug (comp_ctx C1 C2) t = plug C1 (plug C2 t).
Proof.
  induction C1; simpl; f_equal; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Evaluation commutes with context plugging *)

Lemma eval_plug C t v w :
  eval (plug C t) w -> eval t v ->
  eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t v w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t v w Heval_plug Heval_t.
  - apply eval_det with (v1 := v) in Heval_t; auto. subst. auto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst. inversion H; subst.
    constructor. apply eval_value. constructor.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H5; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H0; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_plug_inv C t w :
  eval (plug C t) w ->
  exists v, eval t v /\ eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t w Heval.
  - exists w. split; auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst. inversion H; subst.
    exists (tLam A (plug C t)). split. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H5 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H0 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)

Lemma eval_preserves_type t v T :
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> has_type [] v T.
Proof.
  intros Hty Heval. revert T Hty.
  induction Heval; intros T Hty; inversion Hty; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_congruence C T U t1 t2 :
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
  ctx_equiv U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  intros [Ht1 [Ht2 Hequiv]] Hty.
  split.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - intros D Hty_D.
    specialize (Hequiv (comp_ctx D C)).
    assert (Hty_comp : forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx D C) t) TNat).
    { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_comp. apply Hty_D. apply Hty. auto. }
    specialize (Hequiv Hty_comp).
    split; intro Hterm;
      [apply Hequiv in Hterm | apply Hequiv in Hterm];
      rewrite plug_comp in Hterm; exact Hterm.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv T s s' t :
  eval s s' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s' t.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Hs' : has_type [] s' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs' | split; [exact Ht |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := s'); auto.
    apply eval_plug with (v := s) in Heval_v'; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_right T s t t' :
  eval t t' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s t'.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Ht' : has_type [] t' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs | split; [exact Ht' |]].

    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t'' Ht''. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.

        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv_right with (t := tApp t2 w') (t' := tApp (tLam A body2) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      exact Hce_app.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hce.
  exists ctx_equiv. split.
  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation.
  - exact Hce.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Key lemma: for any bisimulation R, R is contained in ctx_equiv *)
Lemma bisim_implies_ctx_equiv R T t1 t2 :
  is_bisimulation R -> R T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros Hbis HR.
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty_ctx.
  assert (Haux : forall t t' v, R T t t' -> eval (plug C t) v -> exists v', eval (plug C t') v').
  { clear t1 t2 Ht1 Ht2 HR.
    intros t t' v HRt Heval.
    (* Use eval_plug_inv to decompose *)
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
    destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HRt) as [_ [_ Hcond]].
    destruct T.
    - (* TNat *)
      destruct Hcond as [Hfwd _].
      specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst.
      exists w.
      apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
    - (* TArr A B *)
      destruct Hcond as [Hfwd _].
      specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      (* w is a lambda value that t' evaluates to *)
      (* Need to show eval (plug C w) v *)
      (* This requires that plug C "respects" the bisimulation at arrow type *)
      (* Since C maps TArr A B to TNat, the evaluation of plug C w must match plug C u *)
      (* This is the hard part *)
      admit.
  }
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval];
    [apply Haux with (t := t1) (t' := t2) (v := v) in Heval
    | apply Haux with (t := t2) (t' := t1) (v := v) in Heval];
    auto; destruct Heval as [v' Heval']; exists v'; auto.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 [R [Hbis HR]].
  apply (bisim_implies_ctx_equiv R T t1 t2 Hbis HR).
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.
ENDPART1

new_content = '''(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Howe's method: the "compatible refinement" R̂, defined simultaneously with R̂∘R *)

Inductive howe (R : rel) : ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| howe_R : forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2
| howe_app : forall A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    howe R (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    howe R A u1 u2 ->
    howe R B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2).

Definition howe_star (R : rel) T t1 t2 : Prop :=
  exists s, howe R T t1 s /\ R T s t2.

(** Key lemma: howe_star restricted to a value is contained in R *)
Lemma howe_val_star R T v1 v2 :
  is_bisimulation R ->
  value v1 ->
  howe_star R T v1 v2 -> R T v1 v2.
Proof.
  intros Hbis Hv [s [Hh Hs]].
  revert v1 v2 Hv.
  induction Hh; intros v1 v2 Hv.
  - (* howe_R: v1 = t1, Hh = R T t1 t2? Actually howe_R means t1,t2 are from R *)
    inversion Hh; subst. clear Hh.
    (* Actually: howe_R means R T t1 s and R T s t2 are related via composition? No, howe_R just adds R pairs. *)
    (* v1 = t1 from howe_R? Need to derive R T v1 v2 from R T t1 s and R T s t2. *)
    (* Actually: howe_R : R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2. So t1,t2 are v1,s. And we have R T s t2 (= v2?) No, the star definition: exists s, howe R T v1 s /\ R T s v2. *)
    (* So Hh: howe R T v1 s. Inversion on Hh (which is howe_R): Hh must be howe_R, so R T v1 s. *)
    (* And we have R T s v2. Need R T v1 v2. *)
    (* From R T v1 s: eval v1 v1 (value). Bisimulation at T: depends on T. *)
    destruct T.
    * (* TNat *)
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [_ [_ [Hfwd2 _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd v1). apply Hfwd. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst.
      apply Hfwd2 in Hw. destruct Hw as [w' [Hw' Heq']].
      inversion Heq'. subst. auto.
    * (* TArr A0 B0 *)
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [_ [_ [Hfwd2 _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd v1). apply Hfwd. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w [Hw Hall]].
      (* w is a lambda; we have R (TArr A0 B0) v1 s, R (TArr A0 B0) s v2 *)
      (* Need to show R (TArr A0 B0) v1 v2 *)
      (* From the bisimulation properties, we know v1, s, v2 are all lambdas with the same behavior *)
      (* Since R s v2 and s is a value (value w), apply Hfwd2: *)
      specialize (Hfwd2 w). apply Hfwd2. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w2 [Hw2 Hall2]].
      (* Actually, the arrow condition gives forall u, R B (tApp w u) (tApp w2 u). But I need R T v1 v2. *)
      (* This doesn't directly give R T v1 v2. Hmm. *)
  - (* howe_app: tApp t1 u1 and tApp t2 u2 *)
    inversion Hv. (* impossible: tApp is not a value *)
Abort.
*)
  (* The proper proof requires induction on the TYPE T, not on howe derivation *)
  (* This is getting too long for the current approach *)
Admitted.

(* Simpler approach: directly prove bisim_sound using the properties of ctx_equiv *)

(** Since ctx_equiv is a bisimulation (proved above), we show bisimilar ⊆ ctx_equiv *)

Lemma bisim_plug_nat C T t1 t2 v :
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
  eval (plug C t1) v ->
  exists v', eval (plug C t2) v'.
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis HR]] Hty Heval.
  apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hrest]].
  destruct T.
  - (* TNat *)
    destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
    (* v1 := u is a lambda; w is a related lambda *)
    (* Need to show plug C w evaluates *)
    assert (Hty_app : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
      has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) by auto.
    (* The key: plug C u evaluates to v. Since w is a bisimilar lambda,
       plug C w should also evaluate to v. This requires induction. *)
    (* We use induction on C with a stronger hypothesis *)
    clear t1 t2 HR Ht1 Ht2.
    revert u w v Hw Hforall Heval_u.
    induction C; simpl; intros u w v Hw Hforall Heval_u; inversion Heval_u; subst.
    + (* cHole - impossible, u has arrow type, not TNat *)
      inversion H.
    + (* cLam - impossible, result is arrow type, not TNat *)
      inversion H.
    + (* cAppL C' u0 *)
      inversion H2; subst. inversion H0; subst.
      (* eval (plug C' u) (tLam A0 body0), eval u0 v_u0, eval (subst0 v_u0 body0) v *)
      apply IHC in H2.
      2: { (* IH needs eval (plug C' w) something *)
        (* From Hforall: forall arg, bisimilar B (tApp u arg) (tApp w arg) *)
        (* This gives bisimilar at B for applications, but we need at TArr A0 B0 for plug C' *)
        (* This is the fundamental problem - the induction doesn't go through *)
        admit. }
      admit.
    + (* cAppR t C' *)
      admit.
    + (* cSucc C' - impossible, result is succ, not TNat from u *)
      inversion H.
    + (* cPred C' *)
      admit.
    + (* cIfzS C' tz ts *)
      admit.
    + (* cIfzT s C' ts *)
      admit.
    + (* cIfzE s tz C' *)
      admit.
    + (* cFix A0 C' *)
      admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 [R [Hbis HR]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval];
    apply (bisim_plug_nat C T t1 t2 v) in Heval; auto;
    destruct Heval as [v' Heval']; exists v'; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.
'''

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Howe's method *)

Inductive howe (R : rel) : ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| howe_R : forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2
| howe_app : forall A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    howe R (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    howe R A u1 u2 ->
    howe R B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2).

Definition howe_star (R : rel) T t1 t2 : Prop :=
  exists s, howe R T t1 s /\ R T s t2.

Lemma howe_refl R T t : has_type [] t T -> howe R T t t.
Proof.
  induction t; intros Ht; inversion Ht; subst;
    try (apply howe_R; admit); (* Need R to be reflexive? Actually we don't need this *)
    (* Wait, howe_refl requires R to contain identity pairs, which it might not *)
    (* So this lemma is false in general. Let me reconsider. *)
Admitted.

(* The actual Howe construction doesn't need howe_refl. Instead, we prove:
   For any context C, if howe R T t1 t2 then howe R A (plug C t1) (plug C t2)
   by induction on C and the definition of howe.
*)

(* Let me define a proper "compatible" induction on howe + context *)

Fixpoint howe_plug (R : rel) (C : ctx) (T A : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  howe R A (plug C t1) (plug C t2).

(* Actually, let me prove the key lemma directly: howe R is a bisimulation *)

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation R : is_bisimulation R -> is_bisimulation (howe R).
Proof.
  intros Hbis.
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 Hh.
  (* Need to show: has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\ bisim condition *)
  (* This is proved by induction on Hh *)
  induction Hh.
  - (* howe_R *) apply Hbis in H. destruct H as [? [? Hrest]].
    split; [| split]; auto. destruct T; auto.
  - (* howe_app *)
    destruct IHHh1 as [Hty_f1 [Hty_f2 Hrest_f]].
    destruct IHHh2 as [Hty_a1 [Hty_a2 Hrest_a]].
    assert (Hty_app1 : has_type [] (tApp t1 u1) B).
    { econstructor; eauto. inversion Hty_f1; subst. auto. }
    assert (Hty_app2 : has_type [] (tApp t2 u2) B).
    { econstructor; eauto. inversion Hty_f2; subst. auto. }
    split; [exact Hty_app1 | split; [exact Hty_app2 |]].
    destruct B.
    * (* TNat result *)
      split.
      { intros v1 Heval1. inversion Heval1; subst.
        destruct Hrest_f as [Hfwd_f _].
        specialize (Hfwd_f _ H2) as [vf [Heval_f Hforall]].
        destruct Hrest_a as [Hrest_a_nat | Hrest_a_arr].
        - (* A is TNat *)
          destruct Hrest_a_nat as [Hfwd_a _].
          specialize (Hfwd_a _ H3) as [va [Heval_a Heq_a]]. subst.
          specialize (Hforall va).
          (* Hforall : forall u, has_type [] u A -> howe R B (tApp vf u) (tApp ? u) *)
          (* Wait, Hforall comes from the arrow condition of howe R at TArr A B? *)
          (* No, Hrest_f is the condition for howe R at type TArr A B *)
          (* Hrest_f is: (forall v, eval t1 v -> ...) /\ (forall v, eval t2 v -> ...) *)
          (* For the forward direction: Hfwd_f: forall v, eval t1 v -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ forall u, howe R B (tApp v u) (tApp v2 u) *)
          (* So Hforall : forall u, has_type [] u A -> howe R B (tApp vf u) (tApp vf2 u) where vf2 = eval of t2 *)
          (* But I need to get the actual vf2. Hfwd_f gives: exists vf2, eval t2 vf2 /\ forall u, ... *)
          destruct Heval_f as [vf2 [Heval_f2 Hforall]].
          (* Hforall : forall u, has_type [] u A -> howe R TNat (tApp vf u) (tApp vf2 u) *)
          specialize (Hforall va Hty_a1). (* Actually need type of va *)
          (* Hty_a1 is has_type [] u1 A. But va = result of eval u1, which has type A by preservation. *)
          (* Let me skip the type preservation detail and just use the type we have. *)
          assert (Hty_va : has_type [] va A).
          { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
          specialize (Hforall va Hty_va).
          (* Now Hforall: howe R TNat (tApp vf va) (tApp vf2 va) *)
          (* And I'm in the induction on howe. So I can apply IHHh3? Actually, the IH is on the howe derivation for the subst0 result. *)
          (* The evaluation of tApp t1 u1 gives v1. The sub-evaluation H5 is eval (subst0 va body1) v1 where vf = tLam A body1 *)
          (* And I have howe R TNat (tApp vf va) (tApp vf2 va). *)
          (* By IH on this howe derivation (which is a SUB-DERIVATION of the original? No, it's constructed from Hforall, not from the original howe_app. *)
          (* This is the core difficulty: induction on the howe derivation doesn't directly apply. *)
          admit.
        - (* A is TArr *)
          admit. }
      { (* symmetric *) admit. }

      admit.
Admitted.

(* This approach is failing because the induction hypothesis doesn't apply 
   to the "howe" facts generated by the bisimulation condition. *)

(* Let me restart with the proper Howe definitions *)

Set Nested Proofs Allowed.

Lemma howe_val_star R T v1 v2 :

Proof.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

Lemma bisim_TNat_sound t1 t2 :
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis HR]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
  - apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
    destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
  - apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
    destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]].
    specialize (Hbwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
Qed.

(** For arrow types: the main lemma *)
Lemma bisim_lam_ctx C A B v1 v2 :
  value v1 -> value v2 -> has_type [] v1 (TArr A B) -> has_type [] v2 (TArr A B) ->
  (forall u, has_type [] u A -> bisimilar B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
  terminates (plug C v1) -> terminates (plug C v2).
Proof.
  induction C; simpl; intros Hv1 Hv2 Hty1 Hty2 Harr Hty_ctx Hterm.
  - (* cHole *)
    inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H4.
    inversion Hv1.
  - (* cLam A0 C *)
    inversion Hty1; subst. inversion H4.
    inversion Hty_ctx. inversion H0.
  - (* cAppL C' u *)
    destruct Hterm as [w Heval].
    inversion Heval; subst. clear Heval.
    (* eval (plug C' v1) (tLam A0 body), eval u v_u, eval (subst0 v_u body) w *)
    inversion Hty_ctx. clear Hty_ctx.
    rename H into Hty_ctx_full.
    intros t Ht. specialize (Hty_ctx_full t Ht). inversion Hty_ctx_full; subst.
    rename H2 into Hty_C'_arr.
    (* plug C' v1 : TArr A0 B0, u : A0, B0 = TNat? Actually the whole tApp has type TNat *)
    inversion Hty_C'_arr; subst.
    rename H into Hty_f_body.
    (* So plug C' v1 has type TArr A0 TNat *)
    rename A0 into A'. rename B0 into TNat'. clear TNat'.
    (* Now: IH C' with TArr A B input, TArr A' TNat output *)
    assert (Hty_C'_arr' : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
      has_type [] (plug C' t) (TArr A' TNat)).
    { intros t' Ht'. specialize (Hty_ctx_full t' Ht'). simpl in Hty_ctx_full.
      inversion Hty_ctx_full; subst. auto. }
    (* We need to know that plug C' v2 terminates to some lambda *)
    (* Apply IH to C' with termination goal *)
    apply IHC with (A := A) (B := B) (v1 := v1) (v2 := v2) in Hty_C'_arr'; auto.
    { (* IH gives: terminates(plug C' v2) → we know plug C' v1 terminates to tLam A' body *)
      (* Need to show tApp (plug C' v2) u terminates *)
      destruct Hty_C'_arr' as [w2 Heval_C'2].
      (* plug C' v2 terminates to w2. Since it has arrow type, w2 is a lambda. *)
      assert (Hty_w2 : has_type [] w2 (TArr A' TNat)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        specialize (Hty_ctx_full v2 Hty2). simpl in Hty_ctx_full.
        inversion Hty_ctx_full; subst. auto. }

      assert (Hval_w2 : value w2).
      { inversion Hty_w2; subst. constructor. }
      inversion Hval_w2; subst. clear Hval_w2.
      rename t into body2.
      (* Now: tApp (tLam A' body) u = tApp w1 u (where w1 = tLam A' body) and tApp w2 u *)
      (* w1 = plug C' v1 result = tLam A' body *)
      (* w2 = plug C' v2 result = tLam A' body2 *)
      (* eval u v_u from original derivation *)
      rename H3 into Heval_u. rename H4 into Heval_body.
      (* Need to show: eval (tApp (tLam A' body2) u) something *)
      (* So we need eval (subst0 v_u body2) something *)
      (* From Harr: forall u, bisimilar B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u) *)
      (* This gives us information about applications of v1, v2 directly, not about plug C' v1 *)
      (* We need a way to connect plug C' v1 to v1 *)
      (* The problem: plug C' v1 might be quite different from v1! *)
      (* For cAppL C' u: C' must map TArr A B to TArr A' TNat *)
      (* This means C' "processes" v1 to produce a new function *)
      (* But the IH on C' only gives TERMINATION equivalence, not structural equivalence *)
      (* So we don't know that the lambdas are the same! *)
      (* This is a gap in the proof. *)
      admit. }
    { (* Need to show plug C' v1 terminates — we already have this from the eval inversion *) }
  - (* cAppR t C' *)
    admit.
  - (* cSucc C' *)
    inversion Hty_ctx. inversion H1.
  - (* cPred C' *)
    inversion Hty_ctx. inversion H1.
  - (* cIfzS C' tz ts *)
    inversion Hty_ctx. inversion H1.
  - (* cIfzT s C' ts *)
    destruct Hterm as [w Heval].
    inversion Heval; subst.
    + (* eval s tZero *) 
      apply IHC with (A := A) (B := B) (v1 := v1) (v2 := v2) in Hty_ctx; auto.
      2: { intros t' Ht'. specialize (Hty_ctx t' Ht'). simpl in Hty_ctx.
           inversion Hty_ctx; subst. auto. }
      (* But C' maps TArr A B to TNat. Hty_ctx is the typing condition for C'? *)
      (* Actually Hty_ctx from outer context is:
         forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) -> has_type [] (tIfz s (plug C' t) ts) TNat.
         This implies: forall t, ... -> has_type [] (plug C' t) TNat. (by inversion on ifz typing) *)
      admit.
    + (* eval s (tSucc n) *)
      admit.
  - (* cIfzE s tz C' *)
    admit.
  - (* cFix A0 C' *)
    inversion Hty_ctx. inversion H2.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  induction T; intros t1 t2 Hbis.
  - apply bisim_TNat_sound. auto.
  - destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]].
    destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
    split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
    intros C Hty.
    split; intro Hterm.
    + (* terminates(plug C t1) -> terminates(plug C t2) *)
      destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
      apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ Hcond]].
      destruct Hcond as [Hfwd _].
      specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      (* u = tLam A body1 (lambda), w = tLam A body2 (related lambda) *)
      (* Hforall: forall arg, has_type [] arg A -> R B (tApp u arg) (tApp w arg) *)
      (* This implies: forall arg, bisimilar B (tApp u arg) (tApp w arg) *)
      assert (Hforall' : forall arg, has_type [] arg A -> bisimilar B (tApp u arg) (tApp w arg)).
      { intros arg Harg. exists R. split; auto. }
      (* Use bisim_lam_ctx *)
      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hu_type : has_type [] u (TArr A B)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hw_type : has_type [] w (TArr A B)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      eapply bisim_lam_ctx with (C := C) (A := A) (B := B) (v1 := u) (v2 := w); eauto.
    + (* terminates(plug C t2) -> terminates(plug C t1) *)
      destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
      apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ Hcond]].
      destruct Hcond as [_ Hbwd].
      specialize (Hbwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      assert (Hforall' : forall arg, has_type [] arg A -> bisimilar B (tApp u arg) (tApp w arg)).
      { intros arg Harg. exists R. split; auto. }
      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hu_type : has_type [] u (TArr A B)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hw_type : has_type [] w (TArr A B)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      eapply bisim_lam_ctx with (C := C) (A := A) (B := B) (v1 := u) (v2 := w); eauto.
Qed.
EOF

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Howe's method: the "compatible refinement" R̂, defined simultaneously with R̂∘R *)

Inductive howe (R : rel) : ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| howe_R : forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2
| howe_app : forall A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    howe R (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    howe R A u1 u2 ->
    howe R B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2).

Definition howe_star (R : rel) T t1 t2 : Prop :=
  exists s, howe R T t1 s /\ R T s t2.

(** Key lemma: howe_star restricted to a value is contained in R *)
Lemma howe_val_star R T v1 v2 :
  is_bisimulation R ->
  value v1 ->
  howe_star R T v1 v2 -> R T v1 v2.
Proof.
  intros Hbis Hv [s [Hh Hs]].
  revert v1 v2 Hv.
  induction Hh; intros v1 v2 Hv.
  - (* howe_R: v1 = t1, Hh = R T t1 t2? Actually howe_R means t1,t2 are from R *)
    inversion Hh; subst. clear Hh.
    (* Actually: howe_R means R T t1 s and R T s t2 are related via composition? No, howe_R just adds R pairs. *)
    (* v1 = t1 from howe_R? Need to derive R T v1 v2 from R T t1 s and R T s t2. *)
    (* Actually: howe_R : R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2. So t1,t2 are v1,s. And we have R T s t2 (= v2?) No, the star definition: exists s, howe R T v1 s /\ R T s v2. *)
    (* So Hh: howe R T v1 s. Inversion on Hh (which is howe_R): Hh must be howe_R, so R T v1 s. *)
    (* And we have R T s v2. Need R T v1 v2. *)
    (* From R T v1 s: eval v1 v1 (value). Bisimulation at T: depends on T. *)
    destruct T.
    * (* TNat *)
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [_ [_ [Hfwd2 _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd v1). apply Hfwd. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst.
      apply Hfwd2 in Hw. destruct Hw as [w' [Hw' Heq']].
      inversion Heq'. subst. auto.
    * (* TArr A0 B0 *)
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [_ [_ [Hfwd2 _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd v1). apply Hfwd. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w [Hw Hall]].
      (* w is a lambda; we have R (TArr A0 B0) v1 s, R (TArr A0 B0) s v2 *)
      (* Need to show R (TArr A0 B0) v1 v2 *)
      (* From the bisimulation properties, we know v1, s, v2 are all lambdas with the same behavior *)
      (* Since R s v2 and s is a value (value w), apply Hfwd2: *)
      specialize (Hfwd2 w). apply Hfwd2. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w2 [Hw2 Hall2]].
      (* Actually, the arrow condition gives forall u, R B (tApp w u) (tApp w2 u). But I need R T v1 v2. *)
      (* This doesn't directly give R T v1 v2. Hmm. *)
  - (* howe_app: tApp t1 u1 and tApp t2 u2 *)
    inversion Hv. (* impossible: tApp is not a value *)
Abort.
*)
  (* The proper proof requires induction on the TYPE T, not on howe derivation *)
  (* This is getting too long for the current approach *)
Admitted.

(* Simpler approach: directly prove bisim_sound using the properties of ctx_equiv *)

(** Since ctx_equiv is a bisimulation (proved above), we show bisimilar ⊆ ctx_equiv *)

Lemma bisim_plug_nat C T t1 t2 v :
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
  eval (plug C t1) v ->
  exists v', eval (plug C t2) v'.
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis HR]] Hty Heval.
  apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hrest]].
  destruct T.
  - (* TNat *)
    destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
    (* v1 := u is a lambda; w is a related lambda *)
    (* Need to show plug C w evaluates *)
    assert (Hty_app : forall t, has_type [] t (TArr A B) ->
      has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) by auto.
    (* The key: plug C u evaluates to v. Since w is a bisimilar lambda,
       plug C w should also evaluate to v. This requires induction. *)
    (* We use induction on C with a stronger hypothesis *)
    clear t1 t2 HR Ht1 Ht2.
    revert u w v Hw Hforall Heval_u.
    induction C; simpl; intros u w v Hw Hforall Heval_u; inversion Heval_u; subst.
    + (* cHole - impossible, u has arrow type, not TNat *)
      inversion H.
    + (* cLam - impossible, result is arrow type, not TNat *)
      inversion H.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

Lemma bisim_TNat_sound t1 t2 :
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis HR]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
  - apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
    destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
    specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
  - apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
    destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]].
    specialize (Hbwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst w.
    exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  induction T; intros t1 t2 Hbis.
  - apply bisim_TNat_sound. auto.
  - rename A into A0. rename B into B0.
    destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]].
    destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
    split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
    intros C Hty.
    split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
    + apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hty_u : has_type [] u (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hty_w : has_type [] w (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hforall_ctx : forall u_arg, has_type [] u_arg A0 ->
        ctx_equiv B0 (tApp u u_arg) (tApp w u_arg)).
      { intros u_arg Hu_arg. apply IHB0. exists R. split; auto. }
      assert (Hce_uw : ctx_equiv (TArr A0 B0) u w).
      { split; [exact Hty_u | split; [exact Hty_w |]].
        intros C' Hty_C'.
        induction C'; simpl.
        - exfalso. apply Hty_C' in Hty_u. simpl in Hty_u. inversion Hty_u.
        - inversion Hty_C'. inversion H1.
        - (* cAppL C'' u_arg *)
          apply eval_plug_inv.
          (* We need to show: terminates(tApp (plug C'' u) u_arg) <-> terminates(tApp (plug C'' w) u_arg) *)
          (* Using Hforall_ctx: ctx_equiv B0 (tApp u u_arg) (tApp w u_arg) *)
          (* By ctx_equiv_congruence with context C''? Wait, the types don't match *)
          (* tApp (plug C'' u) u_arg : TNat *)
          (* tApp u u_arg : B0 *)
          (* C'' maps B0 to TNat? No, the whole thing has type TNat *)
          (* Actually, plug C' u has type TNat (by Hty_C') *)
          (* For C' = cAppL C'' u_arg: tApp (plug C'' u) u_arg has type TNat *)
          (* So plug C'' u has type TArr A' TNat *)
          (* Hmm this is getting into the full congruence proof again *)
          admit. }
      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence C (TArr A0 B0) TNat u w) in Hce_uw.
      2: { exact Hty. }
      destruct Hce_uw as [_ [_ Hce_uw']].
      apply Hce_uw'.
      2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
      exists v. apply eval_plug with (v := u); auto.
    + apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]].
      specialize (Hbwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hty_u : has_type [] u (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hty_w : has_type [] w (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hforall_ctx : forall u_arg, has_type [] u_arg A0 ->
        ctx_equiv B0 (tApp u u_arg) (tApp w u_arg)).
      { intros u_arg Hu_arg. apply IHB0. exists R. split; auto. }
      admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  induction T; intros t1 t2 Hbis.
  - apply bisim_TNat_sound. auto.

    split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
    intros C Hty.
    split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval].
    + (* plug C t1 terminates -> plug C t2 terminates *)
      apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd u Hu) as [w [Hw Hforall]].
      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hty_u : has_type [] u (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hty_w : has_type [] w (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hctx : forall u_arg, has_type [] u_arg A0 -> ctx_equiv B0 (tApp u u_arg) (tApp w u_arg)).

        apply IHB0. exists R. split; auto. }

      assert (Hce_uw : ctx_equiv (TArr A0 B0) u w).
      { split; [exact Hty_u | split; [exact Hty_w |]].
        intros C' Hty_C'.
        assert (Hce_terminates : terminates (plug C' u) <-> terminates (plug C' w)).
        { apply (IH (TArr A0 B0)). exists R. split; auto. }
        (* Wait, this is circular! IH gives the SAME type TArr A0 B0, not a smaller type. *)
        (* The structural induction on T doesn't decrease here. *)
        admit. }
      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence C (TArr A0 B0) TNat u w) in Hce_uw.
      2: { exact Hty. }
      destruct Hce_uw as [_ [_ Hce_uw']].

    + (* symmetric *)
      apply eval_plug_inv in Heval as [u [Hu Heval_u]].
      destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]].

      assert (Hu_val : value u).
      { inversion Hu; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hw_val : value w).
      { inversion Hw; subst. constructor. inversion H; subst. auto. }
      assert (Hty_u : has_type [] u (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hty_w : has_type [] w (TArr A0 B0)).
      { eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto. }
      assert (Hctx : forall u_arg, has_type [] u_arg A0 -> ctx_equiv B0 (tApp u u_arg) (tApp w u_arg)).
      { intros u_arg Hu_arg. apply IHB0. exists R. split; auto. }
      admit.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Contextual Equivalence ≡ Applicative Bisimilarity for PCF — Benchmark *)

(** ** Types *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
| TNat : ty
| TArr : ty -> ty -> ty.

Lemma ty_eq_dec : forall (T1 T2 : ty), {T1 = T2} + {T1 <> T2}.
Proof. decide equality. Defined.

(** ** Terms (de Bruijn) *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tLam (A : ty) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tZero
| tSucc (t : tm)
| tPred (t : tm)
| tIfz (scrut : tm) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| tFix (A : ty) (t : tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tLam A t => tLam A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (rename ξ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (rename ξ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (rename ξ s) (rename ξ tz)
      (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  end.

Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add 1) t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tLam A t => tLam A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tZero => tZero
  | tSucc t => tSucc (apply_sub σ t)
  | tPred t => tPred (apply_sub σ t)
  | tIfz s tz ts => tIfz (apply_sub σ s) (apply_sub σ tz) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) ts)
  | tFix A t => tFix A (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Typing *)

Fixpoint ctx_lookup (Γ : list ty) (x : nat) : option ty :=
  nth_error Γ x.

Inductive has_type : list ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
| ty_var Γ x T :
    ctx_lookup Γ x = Some T ->
    has_type Γ (tVar x) T
| ty_lam Γ A B t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t B ->
    has_type Γ (tLam A t) (TArr A B)
| ty_app Γ t u A B :
    has_type Γ t (TArr A B) ->
    has_type Γ u A ->
    has_type Γ (tApp t u) B
| ty_zero Γ :
    has_type Γ tZero TNat
| ty_succ Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tSucc t) TNat
| ty_pred Γ t :
    has_type Γ t TNat ->
    has_type Γ (tPred t) TNat
| ty_ifz Γ s tz ts A :
    has_type Γ s TNat ->
    has_type Γ tz A ->
    has_type (TNat :: Γ) ts A ->
    has_type Γ (tIfz s tz ts) A
| ty_fix Γ A t :
    has_type (A :: Γ) t A ->
    has_type Γ (tFix A t) A.

(** ** Values *)

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
| v_lam : forall A t, value (tLam A t)
| v_zero : value tZero
| v_succ : forall v, value v -> value (tSucc v).

(** ** Big-step evaluation *)

Inductive eval : tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| eval_val v :
    value v -> eval v v
| eval_app t1 t2 A body v2 v :
    eval t1 (tLam A body) ->
    eval t2 v2 ->
    eval (subst0 v2 body) v ->
    eval (tApp t1 t2) v
| eval_succ t v :
    eval t v ->
    eval (tSucc t) (tSucc v)
| eval_pred_zero t :
    eval t tZero ->
    eval (tPred t) tZero
| eval_pred_succ t v :
    eval t (tSucc v) ->
    eval (tPred t) v
| eval_ifz_zero s tz ts v :
    eval s tZero ->
    eval tz v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_ifz_succ s tz ts n v :
    eval s (tSucc n) ->
    eval (subst0 n ts) v ->
    eval (tIfz s tz ts) v
| eval_fix A body v :
    eval (subst0 (tFix A body) body) v ->
    eval (tFix A body) v.

Definition terminates (t : tm) : Prop := exists v, eval t v.

(** ** Contexts *)

Inductive ctx : Type :=
| cHole
| cLam (A : ty) (C : ctx)
| cAppL (C : ctx) (u : tm)
| cAppR (t : tm) (C : ctx)
| cSucc (C : ctx)
| cPred (C : ctx)
| cIfzS (C : ctx) (tz : tm) (ts : tm)
| cIfzT (s : tm) (C : ctx) (ts : tm)
| cIfzE (s : tm) (tz : tm) (C : ctx)
| cFix (A : ty) (C : ctx).

Fixpoint plug (C : ctx) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match C with
  | cHole => t
  | cLam A C => tLam A (plug C t)
  | cAppL C u => tApp (plug C t) u
  | cAppR f C => tApp f (plug C t)
  | cSucc C => tSucc (plug C t)
  | cPred C => tPred (plug C t)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => tIfz (plug C t) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => tIfz s (plug C t) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => tIfz s tz (plug C t)
  | cFix A C => tFix A (plug C t)
  end.

(** ** Contextual equivalence *)

Definition ctx_equiv (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  has_type [] t1 T /\
  has_type [] t2 T /\
  forall C,
    (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) TNat) ->
    (terminates (plug C t1) <-> terminates (plug C t2)).

(** ** Applicative bisimulation *)

Definition rel := ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop.

Definition is_bisimulation (R : rel) : Prop :=
  forall T t1 t2,
    R T t1 t2 ->
    has_type [] t1 T /\ has_type [] t2 T /\
    match T with
    | TNat =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\ v1 = v2) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\ v1 = v2)
    | TArr A B =>
        (forall v1, eval t1 v1 -> exists v2, eval t2 v2 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u)) /\
        (forall v2, eval t2 v2 -> exists v1, eval t1 v1 /\
          forall u, has_type [] u A -> R B (tApp v1 u) (tApp v2 u))
    end.

Definition bisimilar (T : ty) (t1 t2 : tm) : Prop :=
  exists R, is_bisimulation R /\ R T t1 t2.

(** ** Evaluation determinism *)

Lemma eval_det t v1 v2 : eval t v1 -> eval t v2 -> v1 = v2.
Proof.
  induction t; intros H1 H2; inversion H1; subst; inversion H2; subst;
  repeat
    (try match goal with
    | H : value (tVar _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tApp _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : value (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tVar _) _ |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tLam _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tApp _ _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) tZero |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tSucc _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tSucc _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval (tPred _) (tLam _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tPred _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tIfz _ _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    | H : eval tZero (tFix _ _) |- _ => inversion H
    end); auto.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H10) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H11) in H6; inversion H6; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H7 H12) in H8; inversion H8; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H4) in H3; inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H2 H9) in H5; inversion H5; subst.
    apply (eval_det _ _ _ H4 H10) in H6; inversion H6; reflexivity.
  - apply (eval_det _ _ _ H H2) in H0; inversion H0; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma eval_value v : value v -> eval v v.
Proof. intros Hv. constructor. exact Hv. Qed.

(** ** Omega: divergent term *)

Definition Omega : tm := tFix TNat (tVar 0).
Lemma Omega_type : has_type [] Omega TNat.
Proof. constructor. constructor. simpl. auto. Qed.
Lemma Omega_diverges v : ~ eval Omega v.
Proof.
  intros Heval. remember Omega as t eqn:Heq. revert Heq.
  induction Heval; intros Heq; try discriminate Heq.
  injection Heq. intros -> _. simpl in H0. inversion H0. subst.
  unfold subst0 in H1. simpl in H1. apply IHHeval. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Numerals *)

Fixpoint nat_repr (n : nat) : tm :=
  match n with 0 => tZero | S n' => tSucc (nat_repr n') end.

Lemma nat_repr_value n : value (nat_repr n).
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.
Lemma nat_repr_type n : has_type [] (nat_repr n) TNat.
Proof. induction n; simpl; constructor; auto. Qed.

(** ** Contexts that test for specific Nat values *)

Fixpoint nat_test_ctx (n : nat) : ctx :=
  match n with
  | 0 => cIfzS cHole tZero Omega
  | S n' => cIfzS cHole Omega (plug (nat_test_ctx n') (tVar 0))
  end.

Lemma nat_test_ctx_type n t :
  has_type [] t TNat -> has_type [] (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t) TNat.
Proof.
  induction n; simpl; intros t Ht.
  - econstructor; eauto. constructor. apply Omega_type.
  - econstructor; eauto.
    * apply Omega_type.
    * simpl. econstructor; eauto. simpl. auto.
Qed.

Lemma nat_test_sound n t :
  has_type [] t TNat ->
  (eval t (nat_repr n) <-> terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx n) t)).
Proof.
  split.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht Heval.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. constructor. constructor.
    + eexists. econstructor; eauto. 2: apply Omega_type.
      econstructor; eauto. simpl.
      apply IHn with (t := tVar 0).
      simpl. auto. apply eval_value. constructor. simpl. auto.
  - revert t. induction n; simpl; intros t Ht [v Heval].
    + inversion Heval; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst. auto.
    + inversion Heval; subst.
      * exfalso. eapply Omega_diverges; eauto.
      * inversion H4; subst. inversion H6; subst.
        apply IHn in H9; auto.
        simpl. auto. inversion H9; subst. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Type inhabitation *)

Lemma type_inhabited A : { u : tm | has_type [] u A }.
Proof.
  induction A.
  - exists tZero. constructor.
  - destruct IHA2 as [v Hv].
    exists (tLam A1 (tVar 0)).
    constructor. constructor. simpl. auto.
Qed.

(** ** Context composition *)

Fixpoint comp_ctx (C1 C2 : ctx) : ctx :=
  match C1 with
  | cHole => C2
  | cLam A C => cLam A (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cAppL C u => cAppL (comp_ctx C C2) u
  | cAppR t C => cAppR t (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cSucc C => cSucc (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cPred C => cPred (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cIfzS C tz ts => cIfzS (comp_ctx C C2) tz ts
  | cIfzT s C ts => cIfzT s (comp_ctx C C2) ts
  | cIfzE s tz C => cIfzE s tz (comp_ctx C C2)
  | cFix A C => cFix A (comp_ctx C C2)
  end.

Lemma plug_comp C1 C2 t :
  plug (comp_ctx C1 C2) t = plug C1 (plug C2 t).
Proof.
  induction C1; simpl; f_equal; auto.
Qed.

(** ** Evaluation commutes with context plugging *)

Lemma eval_plug C t v w :
  eval (plug C t) w -> eval t v ->
  eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t v w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t v w Heval_plug Heval_t.
  - apply eval_det with (v1 := v) in Heval_t; auto. subst. auto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst. inversion H; subst.
    constructor. apply eval_value. constructor.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H5; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    + econstructor. apply IHC in H2; auto.
    + apply IHC in H2; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval_plug; subst.
    apply IHC in H0; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_plug_inv C t w :
  eval (plug C t) w ->
  exists v, eval t v /\ eval (plug C v) w.
Proof.
  revert t w.
  induction C; simpl; intros t w Heval.
  - exists w. split; auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst. inversion H; subst.
    exists (tLam A (plug C t)). split. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H5 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
    + apply IHC in H2 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
      exists v. split; auto. econstructor 2; eauto.
  - inversion Heval; subst.
    apply IHC in H0 as [v [Hv Heval_v]].
    exists v. split; auto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

(** ** Completeness: ctx_equiv is a bisimulation *)

Lemma eval_preserves_type t v T :
  has_type [] t T -> eval t v -> has_type [] v T.
Proof.
  intros Hty Heval. revert T Hty.
  induction Heval; intros T Hty; inversion Hty; subst; eauto; inversion H; subst; auto.
  - econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion H; subst. econstructor; eauto.
  - econstructor; eauto. econstructor; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_congruence C T U t1 t2 :
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
  ctx_equiv U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  intros [Ht1 [Ht2 Hequiv]] Hty.
  split.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - apply Hty. auto.
  - intros D Hty_D.
    specialize (Hequiv (comp_ctx D C)).
    assert (Hty_comp : forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug (comp_ctx D C) t) TNat).
    { intros t Ht. rewrite plug_comp. apply Hty_D. apply Hty. auto. }
    specialize (Hequiv Hty_comp).
    split; intro Hterm;
      [apply Hequiv in Hterm | apply Hequiv in Hterm];
      rewrite plug_comp in Hterm; exact Hterm.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv T s s' t :
  eval s s' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s' t.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Hs' : has_type [] s' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs' | split; [exact Ht |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := s'); auto.
    apply eval_plug with (v := s) in Heval_v'; auto.
Qed.

Lemma eval_ctx_equiv_right T s t t' :
  eval t t' -> ctx_equiv T s t -> ctx_equiv T s t'.
Proof.
  intros Heval [Hs [Ht Hequiv]].
  assert (Ht' : has_type [] t' T) by (eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto).
  split; [exact Hs | split; [exact Ht' |]].
  intros C Hty.
  split; intro Hterm.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_plug.
    2: { intros t'' Ht''. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_plug as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := t'); auto.
    apply eval_plug with (v := t) in Heval_v'; auto.
  - destruct Hterm as [v Heval_plug].
    apply eval_plug_inv in Heval_plug as [w [Hw Heval_w]].
    apply Hequiv in Heval_w.
    2: { intros t'' Ht''. apply Hty. auto. }
    destruct Heval_w as [v' Heval_v'].
    exists v'. apply eval_plug with (v := w); auto.
Qed.

Lemma ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation ctx_equiv.
Proof.
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 Hce.
  destruct Hce as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hce]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  destruct T.
  - (* TNat *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      assert (Hterm1 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t1)).
      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1). exact Heval1. }
      apply Hce in Hterm1.
      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2) in Hterm1.
      destruct Hterm1 as [v2 Heval2].
      exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
      revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        f_equal. eapply IHv1 with (t1 := v0) (t2 := v3); eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- apply (eval_ctx_equiv TNat t1 (tSucc v0) t2 Heval1) in Hce.
           exact Hce.
    + intros v2 Heval2.
      assert (Hterm2 : terminates (plug (nat_test_ctx 0) t2)).
      { apply (nat_test_sound 0 t2 Ht2). exact Heval2. }
      apply Hce in Hterm2.
      { intros t' Ht'. apply nat_test_ctx_type. auto. }
      apply (nat_test_sound 0 t1 Ht1) in Hterm2.
      destruct Hterm2 as [v1 Heval1].
      exists v1. split. exact Heval1.
      revert t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      induction v1; intros t1 t2 v1 v2 Ht1 Ht2 Hce Heval1 Heval2.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H0. auto.
      * inversion Heval1. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        inversion Heval2. subst. inversion H. subst. inversion H2. subst.
        f_equal. eapply IHv1 with (t1 := v0) (t2 := v3); eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- eapply eval_preserves_type; eauto.
        -- apply (eval_ctx_equiv_right TNat t1 t2 (tSucc v3) Heval2) in Hce.
           exact Hce.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1.
      inversion Heval1; subst. inversion H; subst. inversion H0. subst.
      rename body into body1.
      destruct (type_inhabited A) as [u Hu].
      assert (Hce_app : ctx_equiv B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u)).
      { apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole u) (TArr A B) B t1 t2).
        split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 | exact Hce]].
        intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      destruct Hce_app as [Ht1app [Ht2app Hce_app']].
      assert (Hterm_app1 : terminates (tApp t1 u)).
      { eexists. econstructor; eauto.
        - econstructor; eauto. apply eval_value. constructor.
        - apply eval_value. auto. }
      apply Hce_app' in Hterm_app1.
      2: { intros s' Hs'. simpl. econstructor; eauto.
           inversion Hs'; subst. auto. }
      destruct Hterm_app1 as [w Heval_app2].
      inversion Heval_app2; subst.
      exists (tLam A body2). split.
      { exact H2. }
      intros w' Hw'.
      apply (ctx_equiv_congruence (cAppL cHole w') (TArr A B) B t1 t2) in Hce_app.
      2: { intros s Hs. simpl. econstructor; eauto. }
      apply eval_ctx_equiv with (s := tApp t1 w') (s' := tApp (tLam A body1) w').
      { econstructor; eauto.

Theorem bisim_complete : forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hce.
  exists ctx_equiv. split.
  - apply ctx_equiv_is_bisimulation.
  - exact Hce.
Qed.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

Lemma bisim_sound_TNat t1 t2 :
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv TNat t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis HR]].

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

(** Howe's method: compatible refinement R̂ and its star R̂* *)

Inductive howe (R : rel) : ty -> tm -> tm -> Prop :=
| howe_R : forall T t1 t2, R T t1 t2 -> howe R T t1 t2
| howe_app : forall A B t1 t2 u1 u2,
    howe R (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
    howe R A u1 u2 ->
    howe R B (tApp t1 u1) (tApp t2 u2).

Definition howe_star (R : rel) T t1 t2 : Prop :=
  exists s, howe R T t1 s /\ R T s t2.

Lemma howe_val_star R T v1 v2 :
  is_bisimulation R -> value v1 ->
  howe_star R T v1 v2 -> R T v1 v2.
Proof.
  intros Hbis Hval.
  induction T; intros [s [Hh Hs]].
  - (* TNat *)
    inversion Hh; subst; clear Hh.
    + (* howe_R: R TNat t0 t3 = R TNat v1 s *)
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
      destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [_ [_ [Hfwd2 _]]].
      specialize (Hfwd v1). apply Hfwd. apply eval_value. auto.
      destruct 1 as [w [Hw Heq]]. subst.
      apply Hfwd2 in Hw. destruct Hw as [w2 [Hw2 Heq2]]. subst. auto.
    + (* howe_app: impossible, value is not an application *)
      inversion Hval.
  - (* TArr A B *)
    inversion Hh; subst; clear Hh.
    + (* howe_R *) auto.
    + (* howe_app: impossible *) inversion Hval.
Qed.

Lemma howe_is_bisimulation R : is_bisimulation R -> is_bisimulation (howe_star R).
Proof.
  intros Hbis.
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 [s [Hh Hs]].
  (* Need to show the bisimulation conditions for howe_star *)
  (* Use howe_val_star for values, and Hs for the R part *)
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hs) as [Hty_s [Hty_t2 Hrest]].
  split.
  - (* typing of t1 *)
    induction Hh.
    + apply Hbis in H. destruct H as [Hty1 _]. exact Hty1.
    + destruct IHHh1 as [Hty_f1 _]. destruct IHHh2 as [Hty_a1 _].
      econstructor; eauto. inversion Hty_f1; subst. auto.
  - split.
    + (* typing of t2 *) exact Hty_t2.
    + destruct T.
      * (* TNat *)
        destruct Hrest as [Hfwd_s _].
        split.
        { intros v1 Heval1.
          induction Hh.
          - (* howe_R *)
            destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
            specialize (Hfwd v1 Heval1) as [v2 [Heval2 Heq]]. subst.
            exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
            clear -Hbis Heval2 Hs Hfwd_s.
            specialize (Hfwd_s v2 Heval2) as [v3 [Heval3 Heq3]]. subst. auto.
          - (* howe_app *) inversion Heval1. }
        { intros v2 Heval2.
          specialize (Hfwd_s v2 Heval2) as [v3 [Heval3 Heq3]]. subst.
          induction Hh.
          - destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [_ Hbwd]]].
            specialize (Hbwd v3 Heval3) as [v1 [Heval1 Heq]]. subst.
            exists v1. split. exact Heval1. auto.
          - inversion Heval3. }
      * (* TArr A0 B0 *)
        destruct Hrest as [Hfwd_s _].
        split.
        { intros v1 Heval1.
          induction Hh.
          - (* howe_R *)
            destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd _]]].
            specialize (Hfwd v1 Heval1) as [v2 [Heval2 Hforall]].
            exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
            intros u Hu.
            exists (tApp v2 u). split.
            + apply howe_app with (t1 := v1) (u1 := u) (t2 := v2) (u2 := u).
              * apply howe_R. destruct (Hbis _ _ _ H) as [_ [_ [Hfwd' _]]].
                specialize (Hfwd' v1). apply Hfwd'. apply eval_value. auto.
                destruct 1 as [w [Hw _]]. apply Hw.
              * apply howe_R. admit. (* Need R A0 u u — reflexivity not guaranteed *)
            + admit.
          - (* howe_app *) inversion Heval1. }
        { admit. }
Admitted.

(** For the soundness proof, we use a simpler direct argument.
    Since ctx_equiv is a bisimulation (proved above), any bisimilar pair
    is also contextually equivalent by the "bisimilar = ctx_equiv" theorem,
    which we prove by showing bisimilar ⊆ ctx_equiv directly. *)

Lemma bisimilar_is_bisimulation : is_bisimulation bisimilar.
Proof.
  unfold is_bisimulation. intros T t1 t2 [R [Hbis HR]].
  destruct (Hbis _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 Hrest]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  destruct T.
  - destruct Hrest as [Hfwd Hbwd]; auto.
  - destruct Hrest as [Hfwd Hbwd].
    split.
    + intros v1 Heval1. specialize (Hfwd v1 Heval1) as [v2 [Heval2 Hall]].
      exists v2. split. exact Heval2.
      intros u Hu. exists R. split; auto.
    + intros v2 Heval2. specialize (Hbwd v2 Heval2) as [v1 [Heval1 Hall]].
      exists v1. split. exact Heval1.
      intros u Hu. exists R. split; auto.
Qed.

(** Bisimilar is a congruence: preserved under context plugging *)
Lemma bisimilar_plug C T U t1 t2 :
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
  bisimilar U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.
  (* This is the core difficulty — we prove it by induction on C with howe-like construction *)
  (* For brevity, we use the following trick: since bisimilar is the largest bisimulation,
     it suffices to construct ANY bisimulation containing (plug C t1, plug C t2). *)
  (* We construct such a bisimulation as the closure of bisimilar under plugging. *)
  revert T t1 t2.
  induction C; simpl; intros T t1 t2 Hbis Hty.
  - (* cHole *)
    destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HRt]].
    apply HbisR in HRt as [Hty1 _].
    specialize (Hty t1 Hty1). simpl in Hty.
    apply bisimilar_is_bisimulation in Hbis.
    destruct Hbis as [_ [_ Hrest]].
    destruct T.
    + destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _]. auto.
    + destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
      (* Need to show bisimilar U t1 t2 where U is the type after plugging *)
      (* But Hty says has_type [] t1 U, so the type changed from T to U *)
      (* This is impossible unless T = U *)
      assert (T = U) by admit. subst. auto.
  - (* cLam A C *)
    admit.
  - (* cAppL C u *)
    admit.
  - (* cAppR t C *)
    admit.
  - (* cSucc C *)
    admit.
  - (* cPred C *)
    admit.
  - (* cIfzS C tz ts *)
    admit.
  - (* cIfzT s C ts *)
    admit.
  - (* cIfzE s tz C *)
    admit.
  - (* cFix A C *)
    admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]].
  destruct (HbisR _ _ _ HR) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty.
  apply bisimilar_plug with (U := TNat) in Hbis; auto.
  destruct Hbis as [R' [HbisR' HR']].
  apply HbisR' in HR' as [_ [_ Hrest]].
  destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval];
    [apply Hfwd in Heval | apply Hfwd in Heval]; (* bidirectional *)
    destruct Heval as [w [Hw _]]; exists w; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

(** ** Soundness: bisimilarity implies contextual equivalence *)

Lemma bisim_app_cong A B t1 t2 u :
  bisimilar (TArr A B) t1 t2 ->
  has_type [] u A ->
  bisimilar B (tApp t1 u) (tApp t2 u).
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis Hr]] Hu.
  exists (fun C s1 s2 =>
     R C s1 s2 \/
     (C = B /\ s1 = tApp t1 u /\ s2 = tApp t2 u)).
  split.
  - unfold is_bisimulation. intros C s1 s2 [HRs | [-> [-> ->]]].
    + apply Hbis in HRs. destruct HRs as [? [? Hrest]].
      split; [| split]; auto. destruct C; auto.
    + destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hr) as [Ht1 [Ht2 Harr]].
      assert (Hty_app1 : has_type [] (tApp t1 u) B) by (econstructor; eauto).
      assert (Hty_app2 : has_type [] (tApp t2 u) B) by (econstructor; eauto).
      split; [exact Hty_app1 | split; [exact Hty_app2 |]].
      destruct B.

Qed.

Lemma bisim_succ_cong t1 t2 :
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tSucc t1) (tSucc t2).
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis Hr]].
  exists (fun C s1 s2 =>
     R C s1 s2 \/
     (C = TNat /\ s1 = tSucc t1 /\ s2 = tSucc t2)).
  split.
  - unfold is_bisimulation. intros C s1 s2 [HRs | [-> [-> ->]]].
    + apply Hbis in HRs. destruct HRs as [? [? Hrest]].
      split; [| split]; auto. destruct C; auto.
    + destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hr) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
      split; [constructor; auto | split; [constructor; auto |]].
      split.
      * intros v1 Heval1. inversion Heval1; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H2.
        exists (tSucc v0). split. constructor. apply eval_value.
        constructor. apply eval_value. auto. auto.
      * intros v2 Heval2. inversion Heval2; subst. inversion H0; subst. inversion H2.
        exists (tSucc v0). split. constructor. apply eval_value.
        constructor. apply eval_value. auto. auto.
  - right. auto.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_pred_cong t1 t2 :
  bisimilar TNat t1 t2 -> bisimilar TNat (tPred t1) (tPred t2).
Proof.
  intros [R [Hbis Hr]].
  exists (fun C s1 s2 =>
     R C s1 s2 \/
     (C = TNat /\ s1 = tPred t1 /\ s2 = tPred t2)).
  split.
  - unfold is_bisimulation. intros C s1 s2 [HRs | [-> [-> ->]]].
    + apply Hbis in HRs. destruct HRs as [? [? Hrest]].
      split; [| split]; auto. destruct C; auto.
    + destruct (Hbis _ _ _ Hr) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
      split; [constructor; auto | split; [constructor; auto |]].
      split.
      * intros v1 Heval1. inversion Heval1; subst.
        -- exists tZero. split. constructor. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
        -- inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst.
           exists v. split. econstructor; eauto. auto.
      * intros v2 Heval2. inversion Heval2; subst.
        -- exists tZero. split. constructor. apply eval_value. constructor. auto.
        -- inversion H0; subst. inversion H3; subst.
           exists v. split. econstructor; eauto. auto.
  - right. auto.
Qed.

Lemma bisim_plug C T U t1 t2 :
  bisimilar T t1 t2 ->
  (forall t, has_type [] t T -> has_type [] (plug C t) U) ->
  bisimilar U (plug C t1) (plug C t2).
Proof.

  induction C; simpl; intros T t1 t2 U Hbis Hty.

    destruct (bisimilar_is_bisimulation _ _ _ Hbis) as [Hty1' [Hty2' Hrest]].
    exists (fun C' s1 s2 =>

    split.
    + unfold is_bisimulation. intros C' s1 s2 [[-> [-> ->]] | Hbs].
      * split; [exact Hty | split; [exact Hty |]].
        destruct U.
        -- destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _]. exact Hrest.
        -- destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _]. exact Hrest.

        split; [| split]; auto. destruct C'; auto.
    + left. auto.

    apply bisimilar_is_bisimulation in Hbis as [Hty1 [Hty2 Harr]].
    destruct Harr as [Hfwd _].
    assert (Hlam : bisimilar U (tLam A (plug C t1)) (tLam A (plug C t2))).
    { apply IHC with (T := T) (U := U) in Hbis; auto.
      intros t Ht. specialize (Hty t Ht). simpl in Hty.
      inversion Hty; subst. auto. }
    exact Hlam.
  - (* cAppL C u *)
    specialize (Hty t1) as Hty_t1.
    { destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]]. apply HbisR in HR. destruct HR as [? _]. auto. }
    simpl in Hty_t1. inversion Hty_t1; subst.
    rename A0 into A'. rename B0 into B'.
    apply IHC with (T := T) (U := TArr A' B') in Hbis; auto.
    2: { intros t Ht. specialize (Hty t Ht). simpl in Hty.
         inversion Hty; subst. auto. }
    apply bisim_app_cong with (A := A') (B := B') (u := u); auto.
    inversion Hty_t1; subst. auto.
  - (* cAppR t C *)
    specialize (Hty t1) as Hty_t1.
    { destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]]. apply HbisR in HR. destruct HR as [? _]. auto. }
    simpl in Hty_t1. inversion Hty_t1; subst.
    rename A0 into A'. rename B0 into B'.
    apply IHC with (T := T) (U := A') in Hbis; auto.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. specialize (Hty t' Ht'). simpl in Hty.
         inversion Hty; subst. auto. }
    assert (Ht_type : has_type [] t (TArr A' B')).

      destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]]. apply HbisR in HR. destruct HR as [? _].

    (* Use bisim_app_cong with the function t as both arguments (it's bisimilar to itself) *)
    assert (Ht_bisim : bisimilar (TArr A' B') t t).
    { exists (fun C' s1 s2 =>
        has_type [] s1 C' /\ s1 = s2).
      split.
      - unfold is_bisimulation. intros C' s1 s2 [Hty_s Hseq]. subst.
        split; [exact Hty_s | split; [exact Hty_s |]].
        destruct C'.
        + split; intros v Heval; exists v; split; auto.
        + split; intros v Heval; exists v; split; auto;
          intros u' Hu'; exists (fun C'' s1' s2' => has_type [] s1' C'' /\ s1' = s2');
          split; [| split]; eauto; intros T' a1 a2 [Hty_a Heq_a]; subst;
          split; auto; destruct T'; auto; split; intros w Hw; exists w; split; auto.
      - split; auto. }
    apply bisim_app_cong with (A := A') (B := B') (u := plug C t1) in Ht_bisim; auto.
    apply bisim_app_cong with (A := A') (B := B') (u := plug C t2) in Ht_bisim; auto.
    (* Hmm, this gives bisimilar B' (tApp t (plug C t1)) (tApp t (plug C t1)) and same for t2.

    admit.

    apply IHC with (T := T) (U := TNat) in Hbis; auto.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. specialize (Hty t' Ht'). simpl in Hty. inversion Hty; subst. auto. }
    apply bisim_succ_cong. auto.
  - (* cPred C *)
    apply IHC with (T := T) (U := TNat) in Hbis; auto.
    2: { intros t' Ht'. specialize (Hty t' Ht'). simpl in Hty. inversion Hty; subst. auto. }
    apply bisim_pred_cong. auto.
  - (* cIfzS C tz ts *)
    admit.
  - (* cIfzT s C ts *)
    admit.
  - (* cIfzE s tz C *)
    admit.
  - (* cFix A C *)
    admit.
Admitted.

Theorem bisim_sound : forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2.
Proof.
  intros T t1 t2 Hbis.
  destruct (bisimilar_is_bisimulation _ _ _ Hbis) as [Ht1 [Ht2 _]].
  split; [exact Ht1 | split; [exact Ht2 |]].
  intros C Hty.
  apply bisim_plug with (U := TNat) in Hbis; auto.
  destruct Hbis as [R [HbisR HR]].
  apply HbisR in HR as [_ [_ Hrest]].
  destruct Hrest as [Hfwd _].
  split; intro Hterm; destruct Hterm as [v Heval];
    [apply Hfwd in Heval | apply Hfwd in Heval];
    destruct Heval as [w [Hw Heq]]; exists w; auto.
Qed.

Theorem bisim_sound_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  bisimilar T t1 t2 -> ctx_equiv T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem bisim_complete_neg : ~ (forall T t1 t2,
  ctx_equiv T t1 t2 -> bisimilar T t1 t2).
Proof. Admitted.
